name: GasChecker
description: Real-Time Gas Price Oracle & Transaction Cost Estimator. Multi-chain gas tracking across Ethereum, Base, Optimism, Arbitrum, Polygon with EIP-1559 analytics and x402 micropayment support.

skills.name: Gas Price Query
skills.description: Get real-time gas price for a specific blockchain
examples: What is the current gas price on Base?

skills.name: Multi-Chain Gas Comparison
skills.description: Get gas prices across all supported chains simultaneously
examples: Compare gas prices across all chains

skills.name: Chain Recommendation
skills.description: Get recommendation for cheapest chain to transact on right now
examples: Which chain is cheapest right now?
